meaning: [复]n.[用作单]空气声学(研究声音在空气中的传播及其对环境的影响)
examples: Finally the feasibility of spectral element methods for Computational Aeroacoustics is verified.
Overlap grid is selected for helping calculate aeroacoustics following and apply symmetrical boundary condition.
A computational aeroacoustics approach is applied to studying sound propagation in subsonic and supersonic nozzle.
